query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.actionTier, p.discoveryStatus, p.owner, p.productLane,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0) AS total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.discoveryStatus IN ('no_contacts', 'discovery_queued')
  AND p.actionTier = 'tier1_actionable'
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') = 0
ORDER BY p.name
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.actionTier, p.discoveryStatus, p.owner, p.productLane,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0) AS total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.discoveryStatus IN ('no_contacts', 'discovery_queued')
  AND p.actionTier = 'tier1_actionable'
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') = 0
ORDER BY p.name
LIMIT 20;
